title: Informix
breadcrumbs: Deployment Considerations for Performance and Scalability
text: Informix The Informix database connector can be tuned to improve performance with a Uniface application. In certain situations on Unix platforms, the application's usage of heap memory collides with the Informix client's shared memory. To avoid this, set the Informix environment variable INFORMIXSHMBASE to a higher value. For example: INFORMIXSHMBASE=196608; export INFORMIXSHMBASE The command sets the location of the client's shared memory at 196608*1024=201326592 (decimal), which is 0x0c000000. For more information, consult the Informix documentation—the Administrator's Guide for the Informix Universal Server and the Informix Guide to SQL . Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
